SEARCH
Package com.icarus.events

Class EntrantWaitlistTest

java.lang.Object
com.icarus.events.EntrantWaitlistTest
public class EntrantWaitlistTest extends Object
Instrumented integration tests for entrant waitlist actions.

User Stories Tested: US 01.01.01 As an entrant, I want to join the waiting list for a specific event. US 01.01.02 As an entrant, I want to leave the waiting list for a specific event.

Tests utilize Tasks.await(com.google.android.gms.tasks.Task<TResult>) to handle asynchronous Firestore operations and use a temporary Firestore environment (events_test, users_test) to ensure data isolation.

    Verifies that an entrant can successfully join a specific event's waiting list.

  • Constructor Details

    • EntrantWaitlistTest

      public EntrantWaitlistTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp() throws InterruptedException
      Sets up Firestore test data before each test.

      Switches to test collections, initializes the database instance, and creates a dummy event and user document to serve as the baseline state.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the Firestore operations are interrupted

    • tearDown

      public void tearDown() throws InterruptedException
      Cleans up Firestore test data and reverts collection names after each test.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if the cleanup wait is interrupted

    • testJoinWaitingList

      public void testJoinWaitingList() throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException, TimeoutException
      Verifies that an entrant can successfully join a specific event's waiting list.

      This test ensures that a document is created in the event's "entrants" subcollection and that the event ID is added to the user's "events" array.

      User Story Tested: US 01.01.01 As an entrant, I want to join the waiting list for a specific event

      Throws:
      ExecutionException - if the Firestore task fails
      InterruptedException - if the wait operation is interrupted
      TimeoutException - if the database operation times out

    • testLeaveWaitingList

      public void testLeaveWaitingList() throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException, TimeoutException
      Verifies that an entrant can successfully leave a specific event's waiting list.

      This test first sets up a "joined" state, then performs the removal actions and verifies that the entrant document is deleted and the event ID is removed from the user's data.

      User Story Tested: US 01.01.02 As an entrant, I want to leave the waiting list for a specific event

      Throws:
      ExecutionException - if the Firestore task fails
      InterruptedException - if the wait operation is interrupted
      TimeoutException - if the database operation times out
